_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide support to security/certification test and evaluation activities.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate the regulatory implications of proposed data processing activities, AI system deployments, or business model changes, providing compliance risk assessment before implementation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-A-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.527), RC-S-006 (RC, cosine: 0.517).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.504). Shared vocabulary: [activities]. DCWF-only terms [certification, evaluation, provide, security, support, test] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, ai, assessment, business, changes, compliance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.876, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 8-word DCWF element and 24-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Provide support to security/certification test and evaluation activities." and "Ability to evaluate the regulatory implications of proposed data processing acti" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.527 ≈ STS 0.504 (gap 0.023). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [activities] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Shared tokens: [activities]. DCWF-only: [certification, evaluation, provide, security, support, test]. WIDAI-only: [ability, ai, assessment, business, changes, compliance].
